title: Player Immortality Mod
description: Become immortal and never go below 1 HP half a heart of health, except from void damage.
body:
**A simple mod that makes the player invincible**

You are immortal and can never go below 1 HP half a heart of health, except from void damage.

If you fall into the void in the End, you die and lose everything like normal.

Hostile mobs still attack, lava still burns, snow still freeze, hunger bar goes down - everything is unchanged, except damage taken stops at the last half heart left.
